feed.title: SAP Community - BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing
feed.subtitle: BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to check 0equipment attr and Text data in hana view enabled as it is time dependent
How to get the details of the Tools accessing HANA Models
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like to know the best way to know the details of the external tools like Power BI , Tableau etc which are accessing the HANA models/BW Models actively.

I assume if any BW Models is being accessed externally , their details will be captured in the statistic tables/cubes with that we can confirm if any tools are actively calling any BW objects based on application User names.

How can we confirm the same for HANA Models/Tables in the HANA DB? Is there any way to get those usage statistics ?

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Fiori Apps for Data Volume Management
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

Can you please share Fiori Apps for Data Volume Management?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to add a calculated field to HCPR?
entry.content:
Hello to all of you,

How to create a calculated field in my Composite Provider, when the additional functions in the context menu aren't available? Should I activate any feature in Eclipse?

 Kind Regards,
HH

entry.title: Join BSEG, BKPF, EKBE and EKPO
entry.content:
Hello, I am working on a sql S/4 HANA db.

Anyone has an idea how to join the tables BSEG, BKPF with EKBE and EKPO. 

Thank you.

entry.title: How to access comments in BW/4HANA for reporting purposes
entry.content:
I have used the commenting function in #BW/4HANA for data point comments in a query. Technically, the document store object is used. The following image shows my architecture

I have recorded two comments. Now I would like to evaluate the comments in a separate report or process them with machine learning later.

 

The question now is how I can access the comments in the #BW/4HANA backend. When I look at the data (tables via SE11) in DSO /1BW/DOAHD5Z, I see all the data around the comment, but not the comment itself.

 

The question now is, in which table or where are the comments themselves stored and how can I access them to build a report based on them. The report shall give me only all comments.

entry.title: Data source Enhancement for the 2lis_02_SCL with BADI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Kindly please help me to enhance the data source 2lis_02_SCL Data source from the table EKES field EINDT where Confirmation Category (EBTYP) = 'AB'. 

let me know how to write the BADI code.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Trouble while downloading SAP HANA studio setup from SAP software downloads.
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

As per note 2375176 by using the SAP HANA version we need to find the corresponding / required SAP HANA studio version. 

 

Now, as per the HANA version only I have to download the SAP HANA Studio setup from SAP software downloads. But, suppose my version is 2.00.059.xx ( xx= 0.00 to 0.nn) . Based on different xx's HANA studio is different. Now, when I checked the content info of one setup file IMC_STUDIO2_259_14-80000323.SAR , it comprises of all the 2.00.059.xx HANA revisions . So, ultimately which SAP HANA studio version will this setup correspond to 2.3.70 or 2.3.74 or something else. This is the case with other HANA versions also.

example : For 2.00.059.14 HANA version HANA studio is 2.3.78 . For 2.00.059.09 HANA version HANA studio is 2.3.74.

 

Regards,

 

Beena

entry.title: Datasource 0CRM_SALES_ACT_1 & 0PM_FLEET is deprecated and doesn't have alternate CDS views
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are currently migrating ECC to S4HANA and there are two datasources which doesn't have any alternate CDS views recommended by SAP( 0CRM_SALES_ACT_1 & 0PM_FLEET ). They are deprecated, has anyone have any solution for this or came across same scenario? what was done in this case? any help will be really appreciated

entry.title: Do not update delta pointer if not changed since the last update.
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

I have created a data source in ECC which delta is based on a time stamp field.

The data source feeds from a custom table in the same system which is updated every five minutes with IDOC information (EDIDC, EDIDS, EDID4) via custom program (job).

During pick hours this job may take up to 3 hours per execution. But usually 5 min should be enough.

In BW the delta upload is scheduled also every 5 min. However during pick hours the delta keeps running every 5 min and since it does not find any changes in the database it brings nothing from the source. However the delta pointer is updated in source system, and it will keep being updating for 3 hours more bringing no data.

Once the 3 hours job execution is finished in source system, the next delta execution works fine but with the wrong delta pointer. The problem is that during those 3 hours the delta pointer has been updated in the source system and it is skipping all records updated during those 3 hours creating a gap in the upload to BW.

Before changing the delta pointer to a "numeric" pointer, may I ask: Is there any way via user exit to control the delta pointer update in source system as saying: "if there is no change in the delta since the last update do not update data pointer". That way once the 3 hours pick are over, the next delta will pick up in the latest valid pointer without skipping records.

Thanks for your comments.

entry.title: What should be the correct value for "global_allocation_limit" ?
entry.content:
1. Currently host has  “global_allocation_limit” is set to 0 .

2. For the host

    DB Allocated Memory is 361.98 GB (as per screenshot below) vs

    Licensed Memory is 245 GB 

    Total Physical Memory on the host is 377.89 GB

3 Current Memory allocation for SAP Hana Production System is below as per below screenshots.

BECAUSE, Current DB Allocated Memory  (361.98 GB) which is lot higher than Licensed Memory is (245 GB) seeing random errors like "Cache Refresh Failure" & "No DB to sign".

What should be the correct value for "global_allocation_limit" ?

This is our production and critical system so your input & feedback is greatly appreciated. 

Happy to share more details in case if you need.

 

Thanks in advance for your time and feedback !

JS.

entry.title: 0MATERIAL Structure Modification
entry.content:
Hi All,

For some context we are working on SAP BW 7.5 on HANA, on a "classic" DEV->REC->PREPRODUCTION->PRODUCTION environment

For the need of a project we did some modification of the infoObject 0MATERIAL (added a few attributes), These modifications were transported to our PreProduction environnement but will not be transported to the production until some time.

What can we expect from this modification of the 0MATERIAL Structure, is it still possible to transport change of Transformation or ADSO (containing 0MATERIAL) from our dev environment to the production environment?

We are worried that the modification of 0MATERIAL prevents us to do development on our system until the transport to production

for information, in the production system we have access to the "RSDDB_LOGINDEX_CREATE" program

Thanks for your response

Regards.

entry.title: DTP Load Failure due to Overflow converting Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to load DTP on BW4HANA platform ,but DTP is failing due to overflow converting issue.

The same DTP works fine when i selective load the data but when i full load ,its failing .

below is the error message.

Not able to exactly find out erroneous records ,so its becoming very tough to extract the data.

Expecting quick response.

Thanks in advance,

Rajeev

entry.title: SAP BW DTP dynamic filter multiple fields
entry.content:
Hello

is there a way to set the SAP BW DTP filter for multiple fields at once, or do i have to create for each field a routine?

entry.title: SID deletions-Renumbering
entry.content:
Hi Team,

WE have deleted unused SID's in BW on HANA system for some inobjects.

We wanted to renumber the SID's where SAP supporting only renumbering 3 millions a day which take lot of time for renumbering all SID's with its standard program. Do you any program/any other way where we can renumber all SID's at once.  Currently we have 700 million records but the NRIV number reaching 1.9 billion which need to renumber so that we will get more space for new SID's.

BW (SAP Business Warehouse)  

Thanks&Regards,

Anand

entry.title: How to correct Data in ODQMON
entry.content:
Hi All,

Anyway we can modify/correct the issue records/rows at ODQMON ?

We could see some wrong data ( ex: Wrong Date - Ex:24/20/2024  ) displayed on one column at ODQMON level.

When it gets loaded to BW via Delta DTP , its gets failed with invalid date error.

How can we correct this record & make the BW delta load success ? As there is no option to correct data records at ODQMON.

we tried below options to skip that issue records but not worked.

- DTP exclusion of Issue Document number 

- ERR DTP

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Does datasphere work good with ECC or should it be with S4/Hana
entry.content:
Hello

Gurus,

I would like to know that if SAP Datasphere with work fine with ECC 6.0 as far as performance and all the features are concerned or Is it best delivered in when connected with S4/HANA.

We have ECC 6.0 and our roadmap to implement S4 in 2027 but we are trying to do PoC  on Datasphere which is connected with ECC and I am just wondering what are the advantages or pros & cons of datasphere connected with ECC or should we wait for S4 and then implement datasphere.

Thanks for your advice in advance.

Regards

entry.title: How to find data source, extractor, CDS views for time info object
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I like to know how do I find the data sources, extractors and CDS views which has any time characteristics. In other words I like to know that my time related info objects such as 0calmonth or 0calweek or 0fiscper info objects how do I know in which data sources, extractors and CDS views are using these info objects.

If I go to "where used-list" I dont see this information but only ADSO, Queries transformations etc.

I know there is a table name RSOSFIELDMAP which we can use in classic BW, t-code SE 11 to see the mapping from data sources for an object but this t-code is not working for me in BW 4/HANA.

Do I have to use Eclipse or HANA studio or can I use RSA1 in BW 4/HANA environment.

Thanks and much appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: how numeric pointer is set in data extractor 0fi_acdoca_20
EWC BI launch pad issue
entry.content: We have facing issue bi URL access.
